metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students develop technical theatre skills including stagecraft, lighting design, sound design, and theatre management. This course emphasizes the technical and logistical elements that support and enhance theatrical performance.
metadata.general_description: A course focused on technical theatre production, stagecraft, and theatre management.

big_ideas.statement: Technical elements such as set, lighting, sound, and costume are integral to theatrical storytelling and audience experience.
big_ideas.elaboration: Technical design choices directly impact how audiences perceive the dramatic action, mood, and meaning of theatrical productions.

big_ideas.statement: Theatre production involves complex coordination of multiple technical specialties and personnel.
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful theatrical productions require clear communication, detailed planning, and collaboration among designers, technicians, and management personnel.

big_ideas.statement: Technical theatre combines creative design with practical problem-solving and resource management.
big_ideas.elaboration: Technical theatre professionals balance artistic vision with technical feasibility, budget constraints, and safety considerations.

big_ideas.statement: Technical excellence supports and enhances actors' performances and audience engagement.
big_ideas.elaboration: When technical elements are well-designed and executed, they enhance rather than distract from the dramatic action and storytelling.

competencies.raw: Design and create theatrical scenery and set elements
i_can_statements: I can conceptualize set designs that support the dramatic action
I can create detailed set designs and technical drawings
I can construct set pieces and scenery safely and effectively
I can adapt designs to available resources and performance spaces

competencies.raw: Design and operate theatrical lighting systems
i_can_statements: I can understand lighting equipment and systems
I can create lighting designs that establish mood and guide attention
I can program and operate lighting consoles
I can troubleshoot lighting technical issues

competencies.raw: Design and implement sound design and audio systems
i_can_statements: I can select and edit sound effects and music for productions
I can understand audio equipment and mixing consoles
I can implement sound designs that enhance theatrical storytelling
I can operate sound systems during performances
I can design costumes that reflect character and context
I can source or construct costumes and accessories
I can create makeup designs that enhance characterization
I can manage costume organization and continuity

competencies.raw: Analyze how design elements support dramatic storytelling
i_can_statements: I can explain how design choices affect audience perception
I can analyze the relationship between technical design and dramatic action
I can recognize how design communicates setting, mood, and meaning
I can evaluate the effectiveness of design choices
I can understand the production timeline and critical path
I can identify resource needs and budget implications
I can recognize technical constraints and feasibility considerations
I can understand safety protocols and risk management

competencies.raw: Reflect on personal technical contributions and growth
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my technical problem-solving and creative choices
I can identify areas for skill development and improvement
I can set goals for technical skill advancement
I can recognize how I've grown as a technical theatre professional

competencies.raw: Develop critical thinking about design choices and alternatives
i_can_statements: I can evaluate different design approaches to the same dramatic challenge
I can make intentional design choices based on artistic reasoning
I can consider multiple perspectives and input from collaborators
I can balance artistic vision with practical constraints

competencies.raw: Create technical documentation and design materials
i_can_statements: I can create technical drawings and specifications
I can document design concepts through sketches and notes
I can maintain lighting and sound plots
I can organize technical information clearly

competencies.raw: Communicate effectively with design and production teams
i_can_statements: I can present design concepts and ideas clearly
I can give and receive technical feedback constructively
I can collaborate with designers and technicians
I can solve problems through clear communication

competencies.raw: Document production processes and technical progress
i_can_statements: I can maintain production schedules and timelines
I can document technical solutions and innovations
I can create reports on technical progress and challenges
I can archive technical information for future reference

competencies.raw: Share technical knowledge and support colleagues
i_can_statements: I can teach technical skills to other students
I can explain technical concepts clearly
I can mentor newer technicians and crew members
I can create culture of technical excellence and safety

competencies.raw: Connect technical theatre to artistic vision and contemporary practice
i_can_statements: I can integrate technical innovation with artistic storytelling
I can explore emerging technologies and design approaches
I can create designs that reflect contemporary theatrical practices
I can push creative boundaries within technical possibilities

competencies.raw: Explore diverse theatrical traditions and design aesthetics
i_can_statements: I can study design approaches from diverse cultures and periods
I can appreciate different aesthetic and design philosophies
I can incorporate diverse design traditions into contemporary work
I can develop personal design voice and aesthetic

competencies.raw: Engage with professional theatre design and technical standards
i_can_statements: I can understand professional design and technical practices
I can study work of professional designers and technicians
I can apply professional standards to student productions
I can develop portfolio of technical theatre work

competencies.raw: Build awareness of technical theatre careers and pathways
i_can_statements: I can explore career opportunities in technical theatre
I can understand specialized technical theatre disciplines
I can develop skills in areas of personal interest
I can create pathway toward professional technical theatre work
